overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring the Lighthouse of Alexandria and surrounding coastal promenade during the blue hour. The character walks along stone-paved paths, passes through monumental gates with statues, circumnavigates the lighthouse tower, and continues along a palm-lined coastal avenue with burning braziers.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade toward the ancient stone complex

entered.detail: large classical stone structure with columns and fire braziers
calm sea visible beyond the promenade edge
wide stone-tiled walkway with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide stone-paved coastal promenade during the blue hour. An ancient stone building complex with burning braziers lines the left side while the calm sea stretches to the right. The character approaches a monumental gate structure in the distance.

events.description: entering the covered stone archway of the monumental gate

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand archway flanked by large stone statues

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the gate entrance, observing the area

entered.detail: large stone archway with classical columns and entablature
tall stone statue of a warrior in classical pose
matching stone statue on the right side of the gate
massive white stone tower rising above the gate structure

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a monumental stone gate flanked by large warrior statues. The massive lighthouse tower becomes visible rising above the gate structure. The space becomes more enclosed and sheltered, with mixed lighting from the blue hour sky and fire sources.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the full height of the lighthouse tower

agents.ego_description: walking around the tower base and looking up at the monumental structure

entered.detail: wooden construction scaffolding against the tower base
small auxiliary stone structure near the tower

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into an open sandy area at the base of the lighthouse tower. The camera tilts up to reveal the tower's full height against the blue hour sky. Wooden scaffolding and small auxiliary buildings surround the tower base.

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back toward the gate
exiting the gate area back toward the coastal promenade

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back through the gate archway toward the coast

entered.detail: tall palm trees visible in the distance near the coast

segments.scene_description: The character turns around and walks back through the monumental gate, exiting the lighthouse complex. The coastal water returns to view on the right as the character heads back toward the promenade, with palm trees becoming visible in the distance.

events.description: arriving at the coastal overlook with the large warrior statue

agents.ego_description: walking along the coast and approaching the large warrior statue overlooking the sea

entered.detail: monumental standing statue of a warrior with spear overlooking the sea

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the coastal promenade toward a massive warrior statue standing on a pedestal overlooking the sea. The scene opens to a wide coastal view with rocky outcroppings, palm trees, and burning braziers lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined ceremonial avenue with sphinx statues

events.description: ground surface transitions from stone pavement to dirt and sand mix

agents.ego_description: walking along the palm-lined avenue away from the coast, passing between sphinx statues

entered.detail: avenue lined with tall palm trees on both sides receding into the distance
reclining sphinx statue flanking the path
matching sphinx statue on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a ceremonial avenue lined with palm trees and burning braziers, moving inland from the coast. The path transitions from stone to dirt and is flanked by reclining sphinx statues. The environment becomes more vegetated with bushes and trees lining the rocky terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a wide coastal promenade through the heart of a monumental lighthouse complex and back out toward a vegetated ceremonial avenue. It begins with a walk along a stone-paved path between burning braziers and the calm sea, moving steadily toward a monumental gate flanked by warrior statues. As the character passes through the gate, the space becomes more enclosed before opening into a sandy plaza where the camera tilts up to reveal the massive lighthouse tower and its surrounding scaffolding. The scene then shifts as the character retreats through the gate and returns to the coast, passing a towering statue on a pedestal overlooking rocky outcroppings and palm trees. Finally, the path transitions from stone to dirt, leading the camera away from the water and inland along a ceremonial avenue lined with reclining sphinxes and dense greenery.
